summary: Awesome Kutik recording that outshines most soundboards, but the show is a fairly boring set with a sloppy “Might As Well”.
review: The reviewer praises Mike Kutik’s source as crystal‑clear and far more listenable than any available soundboard or his own matrix copy, calling it their favorite version. Musically the performance is solid and soulful for an era they usually dislike, yet the setlist feels dull and is eclipsed by the previous night, with only “Might As Well” getting a mention – and even that being marred by sloppy playing.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review gives a 3‑star overall rating; recording quality is excellent while the musical show is judged average to below‑average, leading to a modest composite score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Exceptionally clear and balanced; reviewer finds it easier to listen to than any soundboard or his own matrix copy.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set is described as boring and overshadowed by the previous night's set, with little excitement beyond a single, flawed highlight.
